diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thanks for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Jordan. How can I help?
[Caller] I want to cancel my Welkin Moon auto-renewal. Also I'm partway through the month — do I get a prorated refund?
[Agent] Happy to help with both. Let me pull your account — UID please?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] Thanks, Kaito. I see an active Welkin Moon subscription, purchased 12 days ago, auto-renewing on day 30 through Apple. Two things to unpack. First, the cancel — because Welkin was purchased via Apple, Apple owns that subscription. I'll walk you through cancelling in App Store settings and it takes 30 seconds. Second, the prorate — and here's the honest answer: Welkin Moon is structured as a 30-day benefit package rather than a cancellable subscription, so Apple doesn't prorate it and neither do we. You've already received the 300 upfront Genesis Crystals and you'll keep getting 90 Primogems daily through day 30.
[Caller] So I keep the daily primogems until day 30 even if I cancel now?
[Agent] Exactly — cancelling just stops the renewal on day 31. You lose nothing by cancelling today. I'd actually recommend cancelling now and simply re-enabling if you want another month, so you're never auto-charged unintentionally.
[Caller] Makes sense. Walk me through the Apple cancel.
[Agent] Open Settings on your iPhone, tap your Apple ID at the top, then Subscriptions, find Genshin Impact — Blessing of the Welkin Moon, tap it, and select Cancel Subscription. You'll see confirmation that benefits continue until the end of the current period.
[Caller] Done. Confirmation shows March 3 is the last day of benefits.
[Agent] Perfect — that means you'll get your last daily 90 primogems on March 3, no charge on March 4. I'll also note the cancellation on your account record for reference.
[Caller] Great. And if I ever want it back, just buy it again?
[Agent] Yep, one tap in the in-game Shop. The 300 upfront crystals would apply again for that new 30-day cycle. Anything else?
[Caller] No, that covered it. Thanks Jordan.
[Agent] You're welcome, Kaito. Enjoy your remaining Welkin days!
